hero.subtitle: The brutal (but kind) diagnosis of your tech stack.
hero.subtitleHighlight: Find out if you really need all that.

verdicts.title: The 7 possible verdicts
verdicts.subtitle: From "you built a datacenter for a blog" to "your FTP deserves better"

severeOverkill.name: SEVERE OVERKILL
severeOverkill.description: You deployed Kubernetes for your WordPress blog

lightOverkill.name: LIGHT OVERKILL
lightOverkill.description: A bit too many microservices, but it's fine

balanced.name: BALANCED
balanced.description: Well done, you found the sweet spot!

lightUnderkill.name: LIGHT UNDERKILL
lightUnderkill.description: A bit more automation wouldn't hurt

underkill.name: UNDERKILL
underkill.description: Your FTP to prod deserves better

severeUnderkill.name: SEVERE UNDERKILL
severeUnderkill.description: Manual deployment to prod on a Friday night?!

dev.title: The puzzled dev
dev.description: You wonder if your Kubernetes is really necessary for 50 users

cfo.title: The worried CFO
cfo.description: Your cloud bill is exploding and you want to know why

cto.title: The confident CTO
cto.description: You want to prove your stack is justified (or not)

final.title: Ready to know the truth?
final.description: 2 minutes to find out if your infra matches your real needs.

{emoji} My infra is {severity}OVERKILL (+{gap}) 🔥

twitter.underkill:

Is your stack right-sized for your needs?

OVERKILL_SEVERE.label: SEVERE OVERKILL
phrases: You deployed the Death Star to heat your coffee. ☕
NASA called, they want their infrastructure back.
Your Kubernetes cluster cries at night.

OVERKILL.label: OVERKILL
phrases: It's beautiful, but you might be overdoing it.
Your infra could handle 10x your load. Or 100x.
You planned for the traffic surge... of 2045.

SLIGHT_OVERKILL.label: LIGHT OVERKILL
phrases: A bit too much, but still reasonable.
You're forward-thinking, maybe a bit too much.
Your stack is ready for... optimistic growth.

BALANCED.label: BALANCED
phrases: Well done! You found the perfect sweet spot. 🎯
The perfect balance between needs and resources.
Not too much, not too little. You've got this.

SLIGHT_UNDERKILL.label: LIGHT UNDERKILL
phrases: It holds, but a little effort would be welcome.
You could automate a few things, you know.
Monitoring? That's for other people?

UNDERKILL.label: UNDERKILL
phrases: Houston, we have an infrastructure problem.
Your FTP to prod deserves better than this.
Backups are overrated anyway...

UNDERKILL_SEVERE.label: SEVERE UNDERKILL
phrases: It's a miracle it still works! Seriously, invest. 💀
You deploy via FTP on Friday nights, don't you?
Your infra dates from the pre-Docker era.

director.title: Publication Director
director.content: StackOverkill.io is published and maintained by Rwx-G.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.intro: All content on StackOverkill.io is protected by intellectual property laws:
ip.warning: Important: Any reproduction, representation, modification or adaptation of any part of the website is prohibited without prior written authorization.

nature.title: Nature of information
nature.content: The information and results provided by StackOverkill.io are delivered for indicative purposes only. They do not constitute a professional technical audit.

declarative.title: Declarative data
declarative.content: The StackOverkill tool is based on declarative data provided by the user. The relevance of results depends on the accuracy of the information entered.

decisions.title: User decisions
decisions.content: The publisher cannot be held responsible for decisions made based on the results provided by the tool, nor for any direct or indirect consequences that may result.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For any questions about this legal notice or StackOverkill.io:

commitment.title: Our commitment: Privacy by Design
commitment.intro: StackOverkill.io was designed with respect for your privacy as an absolute priority.
commitment.highlight: By default, we do not collect or store any personal data.

testData.title: Test data (not stored by default)
testData.intro: When you take the StackOverkill test, the answers you provide are:

items.memory: Processed only in memory to calculate your score
items.notStored: Never stored on our servers by default
items.deleted: Automatically deleted when you close your browser

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard participation (opt-in only)
leaderboard.intro: If you voluntarily choose to participate in the leaderboard, we only store:
leaderboard.note: Important: No personally identifiable information is stored.

cookies.title: Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.intro: StackOverkill.io only uses storage technologies strictly necessary for the website to function:

localStorage.title: Local storage (localStorage)
localStorage.content: Used to temporarily store your answers while you complete the test. This data stays on your device.

cookies.noCookies: No advertising cookies or third-party tracking cookies are used on this site.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.content: StackOverkill.io does not use any analytics tools.
analytics.detail: We do not measure your navigation and do not collect any visit statistics. Your journey on the site remains completely private.

items.shared: Shared for commercial or advertising purposes

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

access.title: Right of access
access.desc: Obtain a copy of your data

rights.note: Note: Since we do not collect personally identifiable data by default, these rights generally do not apply in standard use of the site.

security.title: Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate security measures to protect data against unauthorized access:

headers.title: Security headers
headers.desc: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options and other protections enabled

rateLimit.title: Rate limiting
rateLimit.desc: Protection against abuse and automated attacks

dpo.title: Contact - Data Protection Officer
dpo.intro: For any questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your rights:

changes.title: Changes to this Policy
changes.content1: This privacy policy may be updated occasionally to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements.
changes.content2: Changes will be posted on this page with a new update date. We encourage you to check this page regularly.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This share link is not valid.
